publications.headline: Publications library
publications.body: When the publications collection from epic E6-S04 is merged, recent titles will preview in this band. Until then the static build lists only governed preview text—no invented citation rows.

priority_download.headline: Priority downloads
priority_download.body: Authoritative datasets and briefing PDFs will surface here once the downloads vertical from epic E10 is wired. Switch `teaser_focus` to `priority_download` in this file when editors want this band to foreground resources instead of publications.
